post.description: This API will be used to create new lead to the database.

linkId.description: The ID of the link which lead related to.

userId.description: The ID of the user who got lead.

addedUserName.description: The name of the user who got lead.

addedUserEmail.description: The email of the user who got lead.

phone.description: The phone number of the client/customer.

201.description: The data will be saved to database.

500.description: An error occured while creating lead.

delete.description: This API will be used to delete the lead by its ID.

get.description: This API will be used to get leads of the specific business by providing ID of business.

200.description: The data will be saved to database.

post.description: This API will be used to subscribe the zapier trigger while creating a zap.

webhookUrl.description: The URL of webhook by zap

500.description: An error occured while validating the email!

post.description: This API will be used to unsubscribe the zapier trigger while deleting a zap.

500.description: An error occured while validating the email!

post.description: Creates a new individual with personal, company, and social information.

delete.description: This API will be used to delete the individual by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve an individual's details using their unique _id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the individual

200.description: Successful response with the individual's details

put.description: Updates an existing individual with new personal, company, and social information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the individual to update.

post.description: Creates a new business with personal, company, and social information.

delete.description: This API will be used to delete the business by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve an business's details using their unique _id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the business

200.description: Successful response with the business's details

put.description: Updates an existing business with new personal, company, and social information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the business to update.
